diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, createHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: TypeScript interface definitions for handler composition (x1-x10), Hono class, types from ../../hono and ../../types
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../hono-base, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides handler composition utilities with type-safe interfaces for chaining 1-10 handlers, exposing createApp/createMiddleware/createHandlers methods
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context imports from ../../context, constants from ../../request/constants, types from ../../types, url utilities from ../../utils/url
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../request/constants, ../../types, ../../utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper provides runtime route inspection utilities for matched routes, path retrieval, and base path calculation with caching
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, defineWebSocketHelper, WSContextInit, SendOptions
+- Reads as: Context, MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse from ../../types, statusCode from ../../utils/http-status
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../types, ../../utils/http-status
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper defines event types, upgrade handler function, WSContext class for message control, and defineWebSocketHelper for adapter creation
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: parse/parseSigned/serialize from ../../utils/cookie, types from ../../utils/cookie
+- Neighbor files: ../../context, ../../utils/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper provides functions for reading/setting cookies with signed support, secure/host prefixes, and deletion capabilities
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: hc from ../../client, Client types from ../../client/types, ExecutionContext from ../../context, Hono type from ../../hono
+- Neighbor files: ../../client, ../../client/types, ../../context, ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper creates testClient function that generates hc client instances with custom fetch for local Hono app testing
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: Context from ../../context
+- Neighbor files: ../../context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment (node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light), exports environment binding and user agent detection utilities
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, defaultContext
+- Reads as: raw from ../../helper/html, DOM_RENDERER from ../../jsx/constants, createCssJsxDomObjects from ../../jsx/dom/css, types from ../../utils/html and ./common
+- Neighbor files: ../../helper/html, ../../jsx/constants, ../../jsx/dom/css, ../../utils/html, ./common
+- Safe summary: CSS helper provides styled-components-like API with server/hydration support through createCssContext, exports css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition/Style
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: rawCssString, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, minify, buildStyleString
+- Reads as: No external imports, internal symbols for type-safe CSS class building
+- Neighbor files: ./css
+- Safe summary: CSS helper common functions providing utility for class name generation, styling string building, minification, and keyframe/transition name handling
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy, hopByHopHeaders, buildRequestInitFromRequest, preprocessRequestInit, HTTPException
+- Reads as: HTTPException from ../../http-exception, RequestHeader types from ../../utils/headers
+- Neighbor files: ../../http-exception, ../../utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper provides fetch wrapper for proxying requests with automatic hop-by-hop header removal, Connection header validation, and strict RFC 9110 mode option
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName, handlerName, RouteData, ShowRoutesOptions
+- Reads as: Hono from ../../hono, Env/RouterRoute from ../../types, color utilities from ../../utils/color, handler utilities from ../../utils/handler
+- Neighbor files: ../../hono, ../../types, ../../utils/color, ../../utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper provides route inspection and logging utilities including inspectRoutes for route data and showRoutes for formatted console output
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw, escapeToBuffer, HtmlEscapedString, StringBufferWithCallbacks
+- Reads as: escapeToBuffer/raw/resolveCallbackSync/stringBufferToString from ../../utils/html, HtmlEscaped types from ../../utils/html
+- Neighbor files: ../../utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides template string rendering with escaping, exports html function and raw utility for HTML string interpolation in Hono apps
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: Re-exports from ./ssg and ./middleware and ./plugins
+- Neighbor files: ./ssg, ./middleware, ./plugins
+- Safe summary: SSG helper exports main toSSG function, middleware utilities (ssgParams/isSSGContext/disableSSG/onlySSG), and plugins (defaultPlugin/redirectPlugin)
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, FileSystemModule, ToSSGResult, ToSSGOptions, SSGPlugin, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks
+- Reads as: replaceUrlParam from ../../client/utils, Hono from ../../hono, Env/Schema from ../../types, createPool from ../../utils/concurrent, getExtension from ../../utils/mime, types from ./middleware and ./plugins and ./utils
+- Neighbor files: ../../client/utils, ../../hono, ../../types, .
